channel.title: Ai on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Junho Lee

item.title: Open-Sourcing an AI Quant Trading Strategy for Semiconductor Stocks
item.description: This post shares an AI-driven quant trading strategy and a signal bot’s source code for semiconductor stocks, refined over three years of backtesting, illustrating AI’s impact on quantitative finance.

item.title: 32 Slash Command Shortcuts That LLMs Instantly Understand
item.description: 32 slash commands that work out of the box with Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini – no custom definitions needed. Categorized by use case with practical combination strategies.

item.title: Automating High-Quality HTML Slides with AI Agents and make-slide
item.description: Analyzing a workflow where an AI agent trained on design principles generates polished presentation materials as a single HTML file.
